established.sufficiency: G1-G6 are sufficient for admissible trace-to-scheme export by structural exhaustion of operation surfaces
established.minimality: no proper subset of G1-G6 suffices; each gate has an independent witness
established.joint_with_v35_2: with v35.2 necessity, the gate framework is necessary-and-sufficient (Theorem export-necessary-sufficient)

open.exhaustion_assumption: the six-surface list is claimed to exhaust the operation's structural moments; proof is exhaustion-by-careful-enumeration with candidate-G7 reductions, not exhaustion-by-deduction-from-A1
open.deductive_exhaustion: future theorem program: derive the six-surface list from A1 + categorical structure directly, closing the enumeration assumption
open.uniqueness_of_status_determination: each gate-availability pattern leads to exactly one named status (conjectural; empirically nine-for-nine)

G7_reduction_summary: All 11 candidates reduce to one of G1-G6 or to a precondition on the operation

minimality_witnesses.G2: v18.0 numeric projection over tensor scaffold (inverse fit, quarantined)
minimality_witnesses.G4: general structural — zero-sigma report on transported value with positive input sigma
minimality_witnesses.G5: v18.0 W-route + v27 charged-lepton three-mode + v32 light-quark uniform scaling (all quarantined)
minimality_witnesses.G6: H0 Route-V (residual unassignable to any channel; falsifying state)

siblings.v35: TRACE_TO_SCHEME_EXPORT_THEOREM — the export theorem itself (42/42 PASS)
siblings.v35.2: G1_G6_NECESSITY_DERIVATION — necessity of each gate from A1 (14/14 PASS)

joint_theorem.name: Trace-to-Scheme Export, Necessary-and-Sufficient
joint_theorem.statement: A trace-to-scheme route admits physical export if and only if the six gates G1-G6 all close in their appropriate (numerical or structural) interpretation. The gate set is minimal: no proper subset suffices.
components: v35.3 minimality (each gate has a witness)

next_theorem_programs: Exhaustion-by-deduction: derive the six-surface list from A1 + categorical structure without enumeration
Uniqueness of route-status determination from gate-pattern combinatorics
Bank module registering necessity + sufficiency lemmas as tier-3 [P_structural] checks
